entry.title: Re: How to activate EC Workflows without Employee Central
entry.content:
@rconesa, hi! I tried then, but the workflow objects were not visible in SR. So I used CPI to create additional custom MDF user-based object for the reporting of pending requests. And yes, my users wouldn't have accepted the functionality w/o the report.

Glad that you find the blog of use.

Thanks, Vladimir

entry.title: Re: How to validate the presence of a mandatory subnode in a RAP BO?
entry.content: If the parent key is not part of the child key definition than you cannot apply my proposed coding because of the missing before image of the delete operation.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - Document Information Extraction
entry.content:
These scenarios are becoming more important in the B2B world.
Sales and distributors send emails and Excel sheets with sales orders.
Interpreting this data and exporting it as an order to SAP and non-SAP systems will be valuable.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi SAP community, I am Nina and I hope that we will have nice time here!

entry.title: Re: SFTP Connection Issue
entry.content:
Hi Zubhair,

Check this SAP notes 3359283 and 3079510

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: UI Integration card preview - 404 error for destinations
entry.content: Hello Steve , Did you find any solution please? i have similar issue

entry.title: Central Procurement Approval Workflow based on Accounting Object
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently we have our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Purchase Requisitioning approval flow based on Accounting Object (like Cost Center) which comes as a standard.

We are looking for the possibility to implement Central Procurement to manage multiple  ECCs and S/4HANA On-Premise systems, but it seems like there is no such an option to use Accounting Object for Approval Workflow for Central Purchase Requisition.

Are there any workarounds or plans to implement such function for Central Procurement?

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve Key Performance Metrics from SAP ASE...
entry.content:
Hey, @Mark_A_Parsons, with the help of your response we are able to fetch the data form sp_monitorconfig within the python script. But we still has some doubt regarding the initial data points that we need. The questions are as follow:

1. In sp_monitorconfig 'all' we need the data point for a particular instance id. Is their any way to fetch the data by instance id. Also, the data points in sp_monitorconfig are for a particular sybase server or instance or cluster? (What is the difference between sybase server and instance. I could not found the proper answer in the documents, maybe you can explain it better.)

2. Does 'max memory' resource in sp_monitorconfig shows the current usage of memory?, because in the sybase document I found that max memory specifies the maximum amount of total physical memory that you can configure SAP ASE to allocate. (Reference Link: https://infocenter.sybase.com/help/index.jsp?topic=/com.sybase.infocenter.dc31654.1600/doc/html/san1360629107517.html)

3. For Heap memory, the sp_monitorconfig is providing the heap memory per user, but we need total heap memory utlization percentage, is it the same? I could not found more details in the sybase document.

Thankyou for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Restricting a filter list with another filter - SAC a...
entry.content:
Hi Deb_, 

   Have you switched on cascading effort on the input controls? If it's on, the input control with member list should only show members which have the property value you specified in another one. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: #Multivalue
entry.content:
I have two queries from two different universes - 

query 1 call it STS has Customer #, Serial #, Order Date and Ship Date

query 2 call it cosmos has Customer #, Serial # and Ship Date

My final report should be Customer #, Serial #, Order Date, Ship Date

I would like to use the Ship Date from STS and Customer #, Serial #, Order Date from cosmos, to use the STS Ship Date I created a Detail variable with merged Customer # as the associated dimension

However this results in #Multivalue error and if I use MAX I get the incorrect Date (from cosmos not sts)

How can I report out the correct date and work around this #multivalue error??

thanks

entry.title: Re: Power designer column font color
entry.content:
You can get to the symbol information a column in a table symbol via TableSymbol.SubObjects - not sure if that'll get you the font style.

If you want to control the default font styles for PK, FK columns etc, I suggest you create a PDM that has the standard display preferences you require, then use it to create a User Profile.

entry.title: Re: Problem with InventoryCountings (B1 Service Layer)
entry.content:
Hi,

I've found the same error, so I compare tables an them are equal, only DataSource is diferent, when we create directly in SAP it works

Do you found the solution for this error?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Problem with InventoryCountings (B1 Service Layer)
entry.content: The problem is with POST not with GET.

entry.title: Re: Retail Master Data
entry.content: Hi all, I have the same request. Any news about this issue?

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - AI Services - Week 4
entry.content: @Mikkelj @Hira So sorry that is entirely on me! I mixed up the versions of the executable ID! We want to use the latest version 3 and the ID for that is: 340abda5-d605-452a-bf4c-169249aab362. Please try to start the training again using that executable ID!

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect to S4Cal via eclipse from local desktop
entry.content: Hi Karthick, are you using the S/4HANA Fully-Activated Appliance (or something else) ? What release does your local Eclipse and ADT run ? Please use the newest (or ideally the same release as on the remote desktop). Also, can you use the HANA administration or modeler perspective from your local Eclipse (to single out a problem with ADT only) ? Best, Joerg

entry.title: S4hana Server Installation Error
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have installed a HANA database, with AFL, and EML and EPM. Now I'm trying to install the Application Server, but I'm encountering this error message. Can anyone help me with this?

I 'm getting this error in swpm:

Error

An error occurred while processing option System SID (SAP S/4HANA 2023) > SAP S/4HANA Server 2023 > SAP HANA Database > Installation > Application Server ABAP > Standard System > Standard System (Last error reported by the step: Error during execution of HdbCmdClazz 'INSTALL_HANA_COMPONENT' : class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.CmdClazzParameterFactory, parameters received. Start execution. Check HdbCmdOut.log and HdbStdout.txt for further information.Use Java process call.Execute command: /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm --action=update_components --batch --read_password_from_stdin=xml --component_root=/usr/sap/SID/HDB00/components --components=sap_afl_sdk_aplCannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)Thu May 23 15:10:46 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Cannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)). You can now:

  • Choose Retry
    to repeat the current step.
  • Choose Log Files
    to get more information about the error.
  • Stop the option and continue later.

Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP.

HdbCmdOut.log

Start new command section
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.core.jar | Changelist: 211336 | Release: lmts_026_REL | API-Version: 00
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.jar | Changelist: 213207 | Release: lmts_026_REL | API-Version: 35
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcDriver | URI: file:/tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP/ngdbc.jar
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Adding connect property: encrypt=true
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Adding connect property: validateCertificate=false
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Instance is a multiple-container system.
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Start new connection with connect URL: jdbc:sap://hostname:30013/?databaseName=SID connect user: SYSTEM
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.user.password.HdbPassword | Configured password_layout is: A1a, minimum password length: 8
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Name of HdbCmdClazz: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent | Updating HANA component(s) locally: sap_afl_sdk_apl
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm | Use Java process call.
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm | Execute command: /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm --action=update_components --batch --read_password_from_stdin=xml --component_root=/usr/sap/SID/HDB00/components --components=sap_afl_sdk_apl
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm | Cannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Error during execution of HdbCmdClazz section!
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Cannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.operating.system.ExternalProcess.exec(ExternalProcess.java:185)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.operating.system.ExternalProcess.exec(ExternalProcess.java:127)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.operating.system.ExternalProcess.execute(ExternalProcess.java:86)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm.updateComponent(HdbLcm.java:151)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent.installComponentLocally(InstallHanaComponent.java:879)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent.execute(InstallHanaComponent.java:857)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain.execute(HdbCmdMain.java:113)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain.main(HdbCmdMain.java:74)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Closing connection: jdbc:sap://hostname:30013/?databaseName=SID Connect user: SYSTEM
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | *************************************************************

Thank you very much.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: How to validate the presence of a mandatory subnode in a RAP BO?
entry.content: I see what you mean. In this case, would you recommend adding the parent foreign key field as a second key field in the child entity, even though the current key definition is already unique? Or do you think that the solution to read the parent key of my deleted child entity via the db table, followed by a read by association to my mandatory child via EML is as good? I'm thinking about the potential rework adding the second key could bring, as for e.g. for error messages the %path needs to be filled, and I'm not sure that %tky was used everywhere throughout the whole BO. In your previous reply you mentioned currently there is no before image for RAP runtime, any idea if this is planned for future releases? Many thanks for the assistance!!

entry.title: Inspection Lot Not Generated despite the correct Master Data
entry.content:
Dear All,

Hope you are doing good

Please help to resolve, as our client is using third part tool 3PL with middleware as SAP PI which sends inbound IDOC having purchase order, delivery detail to SAP ECC and it creates GR with movement type: 101.

A month back system was working correctly and now a days we are facing lot of inconsistencies like GR with movement type: 101 is created successfully, but inspection lots are generating sometimes and on other occasions it is not.

We tried to replicate in Quality and it works every time, the master data maintained in both system is exact as well as there is no master data changes w.r.t. to QM done in production system. The solution offered to business is to cancel the GR document with movement type 101 and again perform the GR, users do not want to go with this option and needs a sure shot way where inspection lot is generated every time.

Requesting to share the inputs to rectify this problem. Cannot upload any screenshots due to client server.

Kindly consider.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Controlling Search Fucntionality in Learning
entry.content: Hi Marie - Just FYI the Library Search Results Booster | SAP Help Portal info shows a NOTE stating it is for legacxy search only and Noy enhanced search - shame about that as that wouldve helped considerably. I will explore your other suggestions thanks that it is only

entry.title: Re: Achieve near real-time reporting of SAP Ariba using the SAP Ariba APIs
entry.content:
Hey,
I would like to know if a solution has been created for this issue so far:

"Unfortunately, there is no mechanism, e.g. webhooks, for an external application/listener to be notified when a particular object has changed in SAP Ariba. For example, receive a notification when a Sourcing Request has been created/updated/deleted."

I currently have a project that needs to receive a message via api (webhooks) informing the creation/change/deleted in relation to PR (requisitions) in ARIBA. I am using the Document Approval API.
Do you have any solution for this need?
SAP Ariba Contracts SAP Ariba Central Procurement

entry.title: Re: SAP SD Configuration in Pricing as per IATA Role
entry.content: Did you try with Scaling in condition records ?

entry.title: SAP ECC EHP7 equivalent MDKP table but for MRP AREA
entry.content:
hello,

MRP AREA is activated in my SAP ECC EHP7. I want to get the list of all last MRP run for my materials but MDKP is no more used ( since MRP activation ).

Do you which table is used for MRP AREA ?

Thanks a lot.

Best regards,

Romeo

entry.title: Re: Controlling Search Fucntionality in Learning
entry.content: Ahh! Good to know! I hadnt yet even dived into that functionality and I guess now I wont have to!

entry.title: SAP Integration - after SOAP request and prepare a retrived PDF the response structure is incorrect
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I apply solution which described @stephen_xue

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/abap-proxy-retrieve-pdf-from-cpi-and-have-it-printed-locally/ba-p/13504044

and generally working (I can download PDF file) but payload's response is not valid with correct structure.

1st payload after request

 

 

?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><tag0:GeneratePrintOutResponse xmlns:tag0="http://tempuri.org/">
  <tag0:GeneratePrintOutResult>
    <__identity xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System" i:nil="true"/>
    <b:_buffer xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System"/>
    <b:_capacity xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">0</b:_capacity>
    <b:_expandable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">true</b:_expandable>
    <b:_exposable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">true</b:_exposable>
    <b:_isOpen xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">true</b:_isOpen>
    <b:_length xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">0</b:_length>
    <b:_origin xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">0</b:_origin>
    <b:_position xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">0</b:_position>
    <b:_writable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">true</b:_writable>
    <a:ErrorList xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System"/>
    <a:PrintDocument xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF" xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System" i:type="b:MemoryStream">
      <__identity i:nil="true"/>
      <b:_buffer xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">
        <xop:Include xmlns:xop="http://www.w3.org/2004/08/xop/include" href="cid:http://tempuri.org/1/638520736892059896"/>
      </b:_buffer>
      <b:_capacity xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">96720</b:_capacity>
      <b:_expandable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">false</b:_expandable>
      <b:_exposable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">false</b:_exposable>
      <b:_isOpen xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">true</b:_isOpen>
      <b:_length xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">96720</b:_length>
      <b:_origin xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">0</b:_origin>
      <b:_position xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">0</b:_position>
      <b:_writable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">true</b:_writable>
    </a:PrintDocument>
    <a:PrintFormat xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">PDF</a:PrintFormat>
  </tag0:GeneratePrintOutResult>
</tag0:GeneratePrintOutResponse>

 

 

2nd payload after prepare PDF as attachment

 

 

<ns0:SalesOrderCreateResponse xmlns:ns0='urn:yourcompany.com:sapecc:lead2order'>
  <Order />
</ns0:SalesOrderCreateResponse>

 

 

3rd payload - in that structure should be a response

 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:xi0="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays" xmlns:xi1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System" xmlns:xi2="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns:xi3="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF">
 <wsdl:types>
  <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns="http://tempuri.org/">
   <xsd:import namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF"/>
   <xsd:element name="GeneratePrintOutResponse" nillable="true">
    <xsd:complexType>
     <xsd:sequence>
      <xsd:element name="GeneratePrintOutResult" minOccurs="0" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xi3:PrintOutResponse"/>
     </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:complexType>
   </xsd:element>
  </xsd:schema>
  <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
   <xsd:complexType name="ArrayOfstring">
    <xsd:sequence>
     <xsd:element name="string" minOccurs="0" nillable="true" form="qualified" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="xsd:string"/>
    </xsd:sequence>
   </xsd:complexType>
  </xsd:schema>
  <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">
   <xsd:complexType name="MarshalByRefObject">
    <xsd:sequence>
     <xsd:element name="__identity" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xsd:anyType"/>
    </xsd:sequence>
   </xsd:complexType>
  </xsd:schema>
  <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">
   <xsd:import namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System"/>
   <xsd:complexType mixed="false" name="MemoryStream">
    <xsd:complexContent>
     <xsd:extension base="Stream">
      <xsd:sequence>
       <xsd:element name="_buffer" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xsd:base64Binary"/>
       <xsd:element name="_capacity" form="qualified" type="xsd:int"/>
       <xsd:element name="_expandable" form="qualified" type="xsd:boolean"/>
       <xsd:element name="_exposable" form="qualified" type="xsd:boolean"/>
       <xsd:element name="_isOpen" form="qualified" type="xsd:boolean"/>
       <xsd:element name="_length" form="qualified" type="xsd:int"/>
       <xsd:element name="_origin" form="qualified" type="xsd:int"/>
       <xsd:element name="_position" form="qualified" type="xsd:int"/>
       <xsd:element name="_writable" form="qualified" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
     </xsd:extension>
    </xsd:complexContent>
   </xsd:complexType>
   <xsd:complexType mixed="false" name="Stream">
    <xsd:complexContent>
     <xsd:extension base="xi1:MarshalByRefObject"/>
    </xsd:complexContent>
   </xsd:complexType>
  </xsd:schema>
  <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF">
   <xsd:import namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/>
   <xsd:import namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO"/>
   <xsd:complexType mixed="false" name="PrintOutResponse">
    <xsd:complexContent>
     <xsd:extension base="xi2:MemoryStream">
      <xsd:sequence>
       <xsd:element name="ErrorList" minOccurs="0" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xi0:ArrayOfstring"/>
       <xsd:element name="PrintDocument" minOccurs="0" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xi2:Stream"/>
       <xsd:element name="PrintFormat" minOccurs="0" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
     </xsd:extension>
    </xsd:complexContent>
   </xsd:complexType>
  </xsd:schema>
 </wsdl:types>
</wsdl:definitions>

 

 

How can I convert, mapping the response body ?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Fiori tools: How to set Export Type of List Report?
entry.content: Hello @MioYasutake , we have a similar requirement . is there any update on this . Thanks

entry.title: Re: CDC Consent management implementation
entry.content:
Hi @david-avvale ,

Good day.
Taking GDPR into consideration the best practice would be the first option: 
"Having two sites, one per country, under a parent each one with its own consent statement for each country regulation with several locales for language per site."

We have carried out a similar implementation as well.

Regards,
Preethi

entry.title: Re: Cloud Transport Management Service -getting error whi...
entry.content: Technical user which is used in destionation of Dev and Prod space, was not added in production space memebers.After adding it started working.

entry.title: Re: How to validate the presence of a mandatory subnode in a RAP BO?
entry.content:
Not sure what to recommend. As for the possibility to read the before image of a deleted entity via EML: not on the roadmap. You could open an improvement request to track the progress: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2911
Last comment: you could also use a precheck to prevent the deletion of the last entity instead of a validation: https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/operation-precheck?version=sap_btp. Still same problem with reading the parent.

entry.title: Re: How to change Asset Depreciation frequency from month...
entry.content:
There is no chance to do this. Depreciation works off 12 months only on the Cloud.
To meet the requirement you could use key MANU and post manually the amount.

entry.title: Re: Partial Invoice - Supplier Side
entry.content:
Hello,

Share this with your supplier- How do I hide a PO?

They can then decide when/what to hide in their account so it doesn't create noise for them.

entry.title: Re: I have problems with the Odata service - Error 500
entry.content:
note: 1322182

basically you have to change abap/shared_objects_size_MB to a bigger value.

entry.title: Re: List of Materials That Have A Specific Distribution C...
entry.content: Awesome, this did pull the info I needed. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: .sap files won't open from browser
entry.content: Hi, SAP is a cloud software so it sounds like that is a browser issue. Your client's IT team should look into why that's happening.

entry.title: Re: What’s New for SAP Integration Suite – Spring 2024
entry.content:
What is the plan for HTTP ReTry. Long Pending Feature.

SAP Cloud Integration version 7.18.**, one of the capabilities of SAP Integration Suite, comes with an enhancement to choose inbuilt retry for HTTP receiver adapter.

entry.title: Field ZFBDT for G/L account line item in Fiori app is missing, SAP S4HANA version 2023
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to post a Vendor invoice using one of the Fiori Apps: 

F0859 - Supplier Invoice, MIRO - Create Supplier Invoice - Advanced ( without PO), FB60 - Create Incoming Invoices

On the G/L account line item  we must fill also field baseline date (ZFBDT). Our client monitors  Due date also for the G/L account line items of the vendor invoice and in GUI transactions field baseline date (ZFBDT) was available.

Customization in transactions OB14 and OB41 are done. However, I could not find this field in the above FIORI apps ( i see base line date for vendor line, but not for the line item for the G/L account).  

Did anyone encountered this issue ? 

Thank you 🙂

Geno

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Welcome everyone!
I am a SAP developer from Paris, specializing in Fiori elements V4. I also dedicate a significant amount of time to load testing and DevOps technologies.

entry.title: standard fiori element field length restriction
entry.content:
Hello, 

The standard app "Manage Engineering Changes" is Fiori Element. Its description field is defined as 40 chars in data element. User can enter beyond 40 chars and error message occurs when you exit the field if it is over 40 chars. I'm wondering if field length can be restricted to 40 chars. 

Metadata shows "Type:Edm.String  MaxLength=40".  

Tried Adopt UI in app, no option to modify this description field. 
Tried Annotation view extension, but can't find any annotation to restrict the UI field length. 
Tried Adaptation project, but can't navigate to the object page from List Report. 
(Tried extension project, but it shows an error "There must be at least one XML view with its matching controller to create an extension project". After some research, I've found that Adaptation Project needs to be used in this case instead of extension project). 

Any help/guide would be appreciated. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Invalid URI Segment - Odata service Get Method failed via SAP Gateway
entry.content:
Hi,

While execution of ''ZFAA_ASSET_OVERVIEWPAGE_SRV'' O-DATA API via SAP Gateway for Entity Set C_AssetBalanceOverview Following error occurred.

..ERROR_INFO --  Invalid URI segment
..ERROR_INFO The request URI contains an invalid key predicate.

I have given all required parameter as mentioned :-

/sap/opu/odata/sap/FAA_ASSET_OVERVIEWPAGE_SRV/C_AssetBalanceOverview(P_AssetAccountingKeyFigureSet='DEPR_TOTAL',P_CompanyCode='1001',P_Ledger='0L',P_FiscalYear='2023',P_FiscalPeriod='012',P_CurrencyRole='10',P_FiscalPeriodEndDate=’20231231’)/Set

But still same error, all other Entity set without any parameter is working fine.

any idea or suggestion regarding the O-DATA service execution with paramter.

Please suggest.

Thanks,

Sourabh

entry.title: Re: Request to enter a PIN for smart card when launching...
entry.content: What actually helped in my case, was re-installing the Citrix App I use to access the VDI.

entry.title: Re: How to send ERP copy invoice from S4 to SAP Business...
entry.content:
Hello,

This is possible through the Integration Suite, and you can see the steps to take in S4HANA here- How to send the Invoice Status Update (ISU) back to Ariba via SAP Integration Suite, Managed Gateway for Spend Management and SAP Business Network after invoice is paid on ERP or S/4HANA?

entry.title: SAP Process Automation - Unattended mode after restart
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would need your help with unattended mode in SBPA.

After each installation of security patches on a dedicated station running the SBPA Desktop Agent in unattended mode, we must log in to the tenant. I've looked through the available materials, but I can't find a way to bypass authentication or use saved login data. If any of you know a working procedure, please respond. The instructions show something, but I actually couldn't get it to work. If you haven't tried it, please do not write your opinion.

Thank you very much & kindest regards, JV

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hello @Cristobal_Lopez ,

sure on every certification page you find on the top the so called "View sample questions":

for example here:

These are small example tests, usually around 10-15 questions, that should familiarize you with the testing environment, the type of questions you can expect during the exam, and the language style of those questions. 

This should help you feel more confident about starting the first trial. Remember, you have three trials, so when you fail the first one, it's no drama. It will provide you with more insights about which topic areas you should focus your enablement on for the second trial.

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Add subtotal in RAP unmanaged query
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been doing some research on how to do this. I saw that this is very implement with managed query (via CDS views) using aggregate CDS annotations (only for oData v2 read-only apps).

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/annotating-aggregate-functions-in-cds

However, it doesn't seem to be working when I do the same thing via an unmanaged query. I have also tried playing around with the UI.presentationvariant annotations but no luck, it is also working only for managed queries.

I have also tried implementing the logic from the link below in my unmanaged query provider class, but there seems to be a problem and is resulting to a dump.

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/implementing-aggregations-in-unmanaged-query

The dump is caused by the incorrect select query.

 

 SELECT (lv_req_elements) FROM /dmo/travel

 WHERE (lv_sql_filter)

 GROUP BY (lv_grouping)

 ORDER BY (lv_sort_string)

 INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @lt_travel_response

 OFFSET @lv_offset UP TO @lv_max_rows ROWS.

 

The LV_REQ_ELEMENTS variable from io_request->get_requested_elements( ) only contains the BOOKING_FEE field.

The LV_GROUPING variable from io_request->get_aggregation( )->get_grouped_elements( ) is empty even though I specified the groupBy annotation in the PresentationVariant.

The LV_SORT_STRING variable from io_request->get_sort_elements( ) is also empty. 

Does anybody know whether the @Aggregation.Default and presentationVariant is released for unmanaged query oData v2? 

    presentationVariant: [{
        sortOrder: [{
            by: 'Agency_ID',
            direction: #ASC
        }],
       groupBy : [ 'Agency_ID' ],
       totalBy : [ 'Agency_ID' ],
       total : [ 'Booking_Fee' ],
        visualizations: [{
            type: #AS_LINEITEM
        }]
    }]

@Andre_Fischer , just wondering if you have any thoughts on this? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Integration - APIs with Filter
entry.content:
Hello,

You can 'filter' the returned results by using details other than the header-level information. I'm not sure if that will get you exactly what you want, but you can use $select query parameter and $filter parameter. 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: New MSTeams app home page
entry.content:
Thank you. I also found additional information here

Microsoft Teams Integration with SuccessFactors - ... - SAP Community

Which states it will be available by the end of the month

entry.title: Re: SAP ECC EHP7 equivalent MDKP table but for MRP AREA
entry.content:
Hell @anonymkim 

As per note 2612114 - MRP list is not created by MRP and entries not getting updated in MDKP table

In case the material is being planned at MRP area level, it is possible to use table MDKPDB, that is updated for the MRP area.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Cloud Transport Management Service -getting error whi...
entry.content: thanks for the update but we do have the id in the space members and we are still having the error

entry.title: Problem by Add to criteria in Step 12 Point 15
entry.content:
Hi,
I am encountering an issue when trying to add a criterion. I have repeated all the steps to ensure that I didn't make any mistakes, but I keep receiving the error message shown in the attached screenshot. Could you please assist me with this problem?

Thank you for your help.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: ERP initiated service entry sheet to Ariba B&I is not...
entry.content:
Hello,

It's possible that the vendor ID is not maintained on the copy request of the SES. You (via a Case to SAP Support) can enable the entitlement Ensure private ID credentials on copy documents originating from Managed Gateway for Spend&Network, but note it will apply for all copy docs.

entry.title: Re: Help for splitter and subscreen
entry.content:
Hello, sorry for this late response.

I understand the advice to switch to SAPUI5, it is planned but not before 1 or 2 years (many architectural and security constraints) so no choice to start with SAP GUI, but using the MVC design pattern for less suffer during the passage to Fiori.

Coming back to my need, I understood that I must have a cl_gui_docking_container container on the left for my ALV, it's ok, I have it. But on the right I don't have the choice of having two sub-screens, but how can I "join" them via a splitter? I tried using the cl_dynpro_splitter class without success, and there aren't many examples.

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content:
I am having some questions on this service. Can an individual can able to map the fields from the documents incase if it extracts inaccurate information at premium-edition. Training a premium-edition model to extract information for the required fields is possible at Document Information Extraction premium-edition possible? If we are trying to map fields from the document we are not able to map the required value to be extracted.

I hope will help me with the necessary reply for the query.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration: How to call Azure Application from iFlow (Outbound)
entry.content: Thanks Carlos for the quality of your blogs!

entry.title: Re: I have problems with the Odata service - Error 500
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I went to the TX RZ11, inserted the parameter but I get this screen and can't change it. Is this ok?

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Sourcing Event attachment
entry.content:
Hello,

You can retrieve attachments using that API Service- 

OpenAPI: How to retrieve attachment/s from External Approval API (Task, Document)?\

entry.title: Re: Share module nativescript doesnt exist in share scope...
entry.content:
I would suggest to add NS plugin to the Externals in MDKProject.json. 

"Externals": [
"@nativescript-community/audio"
]
 
Re-create the Android client and try.

entry.title: Re: How to take SAP CDC Data Backup
entry.content:
Hello ,
This is a great concern and I've worked on "SAP CDC Data and Site Configuration Backup Strategy"You can run a dataflow for each of the data centres (if not using global) at the parent-site level to export entire data to your secure blog storage or import to your DataLake or any Master Data system. 

Additionally, you can use the API to also export the configurations of sites.

Also, your admin can request SAP below reports through SAP Trust Center first:

  • SAP Customer Data Solutions SOC 2 (ISAE 3000) Audit Report 2023 H1
  • SAP Customer Data Solutions SOC 2 (ISAE 3000) Bridge Letter Package

I hope this answers your query.

Best Regards,
Kunal Bansal | SAP CX Solution Architect
https://www.linkedin.com/in/thekunalbansal 

@Eldhos

entry.title: Re: Ariba Contarcts in CIG with SAP PO middleware migration
entry.content: Hi, check out Enabling the SAP Integration Suite, Managed Gateway for Spend Management and SAP Business Network on SAP Ariba strategic sourcing solutions.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Transport Management Service -getting error whi...
entry.content:
Okay, Can you please do connection check for prod space destination. It should be 200.

Also check below roles assigned to user who is performing action.

Hi @kalyan_muthyala @Shiva_Ram @prasanna_kumar4

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: SAP ECC EHP7 equivalent MDKP table but for MRP AREA

entry.title: Variant Creation not working for a specific user in SAP FIORI Elements Screen
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a FIORI application which is built on FIORI elements. While all of the users are able to create a variant, for one specific user the Variant creation is not working. User can see 'SaveAs' and creates a variant but when he returns back to the app the variant disappears and what he only sees is 'Standard'.

Is there any auth object that is required to enable variant creation for user ? Any help on this would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: how to change id of a software component from the SLD - PO PI
entry.content:
Hi,

how do I change the id of a software component from the SLD?

For example

I need to create a new software component, but I need to associate a specific id


Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone – Central Entry Point For SAP
entry.content:
Thanks, Santosh for writing such a wonderful blog. 

Well, Is there an option to bring only Catalog to the SAP Build Workzone? 

I require that users have access to the "Display Journal entry" but we don't want to show them the tile. The user will click on the MYInbox app and if he clicks on the Journal entry number, it should take him to display the journal entry. 

At present, If I am assigning a Role to the user, it is also showing an app to him on his Workzone site.

entry.title: Re: SAP SAC DataAction dimension Member property filter u...
entry.content:
Hi narendar_vuppalapati , 

   As far as I understand, currently advance formula is NOT capable of such string type of calculation. It's still recommend to use multiple dimension property fields to achieve your requirements.  

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am a women and I do not have as many privileges' and economic hardships have kept me behind and look forward to be in this SAP Digital Initiatives Program for myself and my organization growth - ready for new challenges and acquire market relevant certifications which is globally recognized and will give me new wings to explore new opportunities !

I am very interested in digital skills initiative as it will give me an identity and help enhance my skills further in SAP . I have been very hardworking and upskilling myself with the resources I had but in today's world that isn't enough and a certification is required in order to establish identity which is globally recognized and looking forward for a free SAP certification attempt .

I hope to hear from you soon.

Regards, Benaifer

entry.title: Subtotal not being displayed in the fiori app created from SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hi,

I noticed that when I enabled the aggregation for my CDS view, the subtotals and grouping are being displayed properly in the preview app from ADT.

However, when I created the app from SAP BAS, the subtotals/grouping are not displayed/applied by default. Are there any extra steps to achieve this? Am I supposed to select the analytical list template instead of the list page template, even though I don't need the charts?

@Andre_Fischer, any thoughts on this? Thanks!

entry.title: SAP datasphere hibernate
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Is it possible to hibernate standard Datasphere services, such as HANA Cloud and Data Intelligence, to reduce costs when they are not in use?

entry.title: Re: Customer is looking for the deployment resource for c...
entry.content: Hi, I think SAP Business Network Commerce Automation Deployment Description would be helpful to you!

entry.title: Re: Asking and Answering Questions in the Community After Migration
entry.content:
Hi, @paddyw:

I was going to direct you to https://community.sap.com/t5/what-s-new/what-you-need-to-know-about-blogging-post-migration/ba-p/309730 (as I cover how to find drafts there), but @JimSpath did a great job of providing similar directions.

There is also an FAQ section about this topic (https://community.sap.com/t5/help/faqpage/title/drafts), and there are a few how-to videos that you show how to find drafts: https://pages.community.sap.com/resources/how-to-videos.

I hope that helps. If you have other questions about blogging, I'd recommend adding them to the thread for https://community.sap.com/t5/what-s-new/what-you-need-to-know-about-blogging-post-migration/ba-p/309730, as your question is a bit off-topic for a Q&A thread. Best to ask blogging questions in that blogging thread. You can also ask questions about the community in this board: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/qa-p/website-questions.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: SAP VIM with Open Text
entry.content:
Hello, 

Some guidance on Managed Gateway for Spend&Network with SAP ERP and OpenText VIM is available, but your CSP would be able to get you connected with the right SAP team for more help.

entry.title: Re: Regarding UOM Mapping in CIG
entry.content:
Hi,

This could be due to a conversion issue if your ERP isn't converting the UoM from the SES. I would check if the documents failing are formatted in ISO.

entry.title: Hybris does not use SOLR Stopwords
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I'm facing an issue with SOLR Stopwords in Hybris (version 6.5).

I followed step by step the guide provided by SAP, but nothing happens. It seems Hybris does not use them. Could it depends on the type of search the storefront is using? I see in the url after a serch "?text=...". Or, Could be the xml configuration of SOLR?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: Deep concern regarding Regulatory Content Update (OnPrem)
entry.content:
Dear Community

I was convinced, as is/was my customer, that SAP provides regular Regulatory Content Updates, compliance requirements (legal aspects) and listed substance content, as well as suitable data content and regulatory graphics, outside version upgrades: see note 3055767 - Configuration of the SAP Regulatory Content Service for Product Compliance and Environment, Health, and Safety Management.

This is an especially critical feature regarding OnPrem installations, which only upgrade every two years, risking serious threats to business due to lagging contents.

I just attended the webinar "Ensure Product Compliance with SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance", with Product Marketing Manager for Product Compliance, Dr. Rüdiger Kreuzholz. At the end he stated that only listed substances, phrases and graphics substances can be updated outside version upgrades. 

Now I'm confused and deeply concerned as without the option of updating compliance requirements, the solution is basically worthless? 

An important note: It's my first implementation of this product - in this case, OnPrem, version 2023 - and the note cited above (as well as its "companion" note 3344198) has not yet been implemented (as of the writing of this post, "we" are waiting for the reply from the "API Business Hub Enterprise").

Thank you for your help in advance.

entry.title: Re: How can we open IQ 16.1 under SUSE 15 with O_DIRECT f...
entry.content: Are you running IQ 16.1 under SUSE 15 SP5 in MPX mode ?

entry.title: Re: Space between page header and table header on multipl...
entry.content: I read all the solutions but none of them worked for me.  In my case, I simply had a table that followed the page header and on page 2 and afterward it was butting up as described.  My solution was to insert another row in the table just above the existing table header.  I sized the height to .05 and removed any relative vertical positioning.  I then made sure that there were no undesired borders in all that rows cells.  This works beautifully, is easy, and is a primary solution to providing spacing between the header and subsequent tables or as an alternative to relative spacing.

entry.title: Re: How can we open IQ 16.1 under SUSE 15 with O_DIRECT f...
entry.content: Does it cover IQ MPX 16.1 under SUSE 15 SP5 and FileSystem DBfiles ?

entry.title: Conversion Routine in AMDP for MATERIAL (MATNR)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we use 'CONVERSION_EXIT_MATN1_INPUT'  in AMDP, where we need to convert Material No, into internal formant ? we have to avoid loop

entry.title: Re: While creating outbound delivery I am getting an error " Component not active" Message
entry.content:
Dear Fqazi, could you please provide further information regarding how you created this outbound delivery until the error message you received? Would be better to send us the steps to reproduce the issue to further check this situation inside your system opening a case for SAP Support. But if you prefer can send it by there, and we can take a quick look if it's not confidential information.

 

Many Thanks!

 

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Re: SAP CDC | PhoneNumber as login identifier
entry.content:
Hello @Rvanjari,

The  SAP CDC platform's design prevents duplicate phone numbers for contacts to ensure data integrity and security, especially for operations like OTP and verification.

You can alternatively, use the EMAIL as UID and also store multiple phone numbers under the PHONE field.
Once you enabled Phone no. as an identifier, you wouldn't and shouldn't do as you wish.

I hope this answers your query.

Best Regards,
Kunal Bansal | SAP CX Solution Architect

https://www.linkedin.com/in/thekunalbansal

entry.title: Errors during insert in Z* table from tab delimited file
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I have a bigtab delimited file (*.txt) with some 30 fields separated by tabs in a record.
These fields are spilling over to next row.
 
Issue 1 ) When i am reading this file using GUI_UPLOAD, its only taking 26 fields & ignoring other 4 fields.
I delared my itab like this:
 
types: begin of ty_filedata,
         lv_data  type string, 
       end of ty_filedata.
 
data: gt_filedata type standard table of ty_filedata.
 
I tried declaring lv_data with 3000 chars like below also:
lv_data(3000) type c.
 
Issue 2): I am looping at above gt_filedata & splitting at tabs'(using cl_abap_char_utilities=>horizontal_tab)
but i cannot see that all fields are getting updated into gt_data.
 
loop at gt_filedata into data(ls_filedata).
    split ls_filedata-lv_data at cl_abap_char_utilities=>horizontal_tab into  wa_data-field1   wa_data-field2
  ....... .....
  ..... ........
wa_data-field30.
  append wa_data to gt_data.
endloop.

entry.title: Re: Express document" update was cancelled" received from author
entry.content:
Hi, today I also faced the same issue & resolved through copy control settings from billing to sales document.

You can check your settings. You will definitely resolved this issue.

Thanks & Regards

Pawan kumar singh

entry.title: Re: SAP is already log on than skip Log on Process code and Run directly GUI Recorded Script VBA Cod
entry.content: Hey,

entry.title: Re: Cloud Transport Management Service -getting error whi...
entry.content: Yes both of those are ok in our system 😞

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I am an EDI specialist with 15 years experience working with EDI interfaces within supply chain management environments. I fall under the following categories: 1. Women and 2. People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I hope to become an SD and EDI Functional Analyst.  Thank you for this opportunity to achieve certification. The Digital Skills Initiative is an amazing idea!  Kudos! 

Regards,

Veronica

entry.title: Re: Help for splitter and subscreen
entry.content:
1. Create a special element of type splitter in your screen, any name, SASH 50% for instance anyway you'll set it by program, choose "vertical", give names for the splitter and the two subscreen areas (top and bottom). If I remember well, use CALL SUBSCREEN to include the subscreens you want in the top and bottom subscreen areas.
  2. Before the CALL SCREEN or during PBO, create the instance of CL_DYNPRO_SPLITTER with the name of the element. Possibly, call SET_SASH method to set the SASH % (use 50 the first time), assign 
  3. In the PAI, call GET_SASH method to get the SASH %, you will use it for the next SET_SASH in the PBO.

entry.title: Re: Where can I find free material to study SAP SuccessFa...
entry.content:
Hi @MahaSF 
I recommend to access our free Configuring SAP SuccessFactors Compensation learning journey t build the skills you need at your own pace.

Overview
This learning journey will guide you through the configurations necessary to implement SAP SuccessFactors Compensation.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants will be able to perform and configure the core functionalities within SAP SuccessFactors Compensation and access the resources and support available to configure additional features.


Prerequisites
  • Exploring the SAP SuccessFactors Platform

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Error when executing the Sync SAP Information to Arib...
entry.content:
Hello, 

As the Managed Gateway for Spend&Network programs create the Logical port definition for their proxy objects automatically, there is no need to manually create them.
Delete the logical port definition via SOAMANAGER and execute the Interface Setup or Synchronization program again.

If the issue persists after deleting the logical port definition, check if the table ARBCIG_CIG_URL from client 000 is consistent with the table with the current client you're executing the program. If not, perform the client copy from client 000, described in the Managed Gateway for Spend&Network installation guide.

How to copy content from client 000

entry.title: SAC for office excel stuck on login screen
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to access SAC Excel add-in and its loading & loading when we click on login and ended without logging in. PFA for more info about the issue and version details.

This issue is only affecting a few users. These affected users have the latest MS Excel installed and they have used the Add-in for several months until yesterday afternoon when the issue began.

Most of the other users can login in seconds.

Please let us know if there is any resolution recommendations. We have tried removing excel add-in and add it again.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba cycle time
entry.content:
Hi,

 That is a system design, so no way to currently change it. You could submit an enhancement request, however.

entry.title: How to use Reference material for Automatic packing, What are the config steps and Master data setup
entry.content:
Hi Experts

 My client want to use the reference material functionality for automatic packing. Appreciate, if you can provide the inputs on the config and master data setup.

entry.title: Variable Pay - Calculation to exclude LOA period for given condition
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We got a requirement as below and looking for any suggestions or solutions on this.

We have employees taking leave across years and they are not eligible for Bonus. But, from this year, for those employees, we want to give a benefit of first 30 day bonus and in the consecutive years, no bonus should get calculated.

For ex: if an employee goes on leave on Nov 1 2023 and returns May 30 2024. This year, 2024, we should not pay him any bonus as that employee was paid bonus for 30 days in 2023.

Am checking if any of the customers have this type of requirement and handled it. If so, let me know the solution or suggest any solution.

Thank you.

Regards,
Balaji

entry.title: ABAPer (HANA) need direction on BTP vs GenAI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am an SAP ABAP HANA Consultant with more than 15 yrs exp.  I have worked in FIORI based development.  As I am reaching 'old timer' status, what should be way forward.  Should I focus on SAP BTP or GENAI.  Also I have interest in SAP PP/DS and PM.

If it is GENAI, what is the role should I look for.  In india its tough to work as a developer after this much years.

Need your valuable suggestions.

Regards

Sunil

entry.title: Re: Emarsys Open data
entry.content:
Hello @iammilos,
Based on my experience, I can confirm that there are no restrictions on using the Emarsys Open Data only for EU or specific regions.

You can get in touch with your SAP Success Manager and they will support you or submit a SAP ticket.

ℹ️Info for others: Open Data is a Google Cloud Platform plug-in that enables you to query and export all the email, web, sms and mobile app behaviour and response data that you have stored in your Emarsys account. 

I hope this answers your query.

Best Regards,
Kunal Bansal | SAP CX Solution Architect
https://www.linkedin.com/in/thekunalbansal

entry.title: Re: PO blocked in S4 cancels PO in Ariba network.
entry.content: Hi, this is the expected behavior so both systems synch upon deletion indicators and to make sure the right status reflects in both your ERP and the Business Network. Perhaps your CSP can help you get more help through consulting, however!

entry.title: Successfactor Monthly Time Sheet can't be enabled in Time Recording Approval Period
entry.content: I have set the relevant permissions as required in RBP and active time tracking feature, but when I create Time Recording Approval Period this object, the system prompts that Monthly cannot be created with error message 'Monthly period length is currently not supported', there are no employee time sheet data in system, it is blank system, what I miss something, any expert could give me some tips to help to deal with this situation, thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: Ariba Suite -Ariba Network-Ariba CIG
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP managed gateway (formerly known as Ariba CIG) can maintain integrations with other SAP apps, the Business Network, and ERP systems. 

Where can I find Managed Gateway for Spend&Network-related guides? has some good general information attached that can help you learn more!

entry.title: Re: Subtotal not being displayed in the fiori app created...
entry.content: Found the answer for this one, we have to change the table type and table settings to use AnalyticalTable instead of ResponsiveTable.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content:
Thanks @noravonthenen for curating this amazing developer challenge on AI.

I m a bit late, but below is my submission for Week 1.

 

Thanks,
Harshita

entry.title: Re: OData Services Functionality in SAP Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello @wwojtas,

In SAP C4Cv2, predefined REST APIs are available but may not cover all objects like Accounts. To integrate external 3rd party and synchronize such objects, you can explore the following options:

  • Use SAP Cloud Application Studio to create custom APIs, exposing necessary endpoints for objects not included in the predefined REST APIs.
  • Use CPI to build custom integration flows, connecting V2 with third-party systems.

I hope this answers your query.

Best Regards,
Kunal Bansal | SAP CX Solution Architect
https://www.linkedin.com/in/thekunalbansal
